styles.name: 3D国创
styles.description: 东方玄幻 3D 电影质感，冷色雾景与金属细节
styles.reversePrompt: Epic Chinese fantasy hero, cinematic 3D render, realistic fabric and armor micro-details, volumetric mist, cold blue-gray palette, dramatic rim light, temple architecture, clean silhouette, high contrast, ultra detailed.

styles.name: 2D漫剧
styles.description: 柔和月夜、线条细腻、少女漫叙事氛围
styles.reversePrompt: 2D romantic manhua illustration, gentle moonlight, thin clean linework, pastel blue and lavender palette, delicate costume folds, soft bloom, poetic atmosphere, subtle depth layers.

styles.name: 都市言情
styles.description: 夜景暖光与时装角色，现代情绪叙事
styles.reversePrompt: Modern urban romance illustration, fashionable character portrait, warm city bokeh lights, cinematic night scene, refined facial features, clean composition, subtle emotional storytelling.

styles.name: 80s年代
styles.description: 复古赛璐璐动画感与颗粒噪点
styles.reversePrompt: 1980s retro anime frame, cel-shading, thick ink lines, slightly desaturated colors, CRT grain and texture noise, cockpit or vintage sci-fi setting, expressive character design.

styles.name: 吉卜力
styles.description: 温暖自然光、手绘背景与治愈叙事
styles.reversePrompt: Warm hand-painted animation background, ghibli-inspired pastoral scene, watercolor textures, sun rays through clouds, tender storytelling mood, soft brush strokes, natural greens.

styles.name: 清新水彩墨线
styles.description: 轻透水彩与墨线勾勒，青春日常感
styles.reversePrompt: Fresh watercolor illustration with ink outlines, light pastel palette, paper texture, airy highlights, youthful daily-life mood, clean silhouette, spring atmosphere.

styles.name: 粘土玩具
styles.description: 黏土手作体块与柔暖布光
styles.reversePrompt: Clay toy style miniature scene, handmade sculpting marks, soft studio sunlight, shallow depth of field, warm neutral palette, tactile material realism, cozy tabletop composition.

styles.name: 潮流都市
styles.description: 高饱和霓虹街头与潮流插画
styles.reversePrompt: Trendy urban street art illustration, high-saturation neon palette, bold graphic blocks, graffiti wall, dynamic character pose, sharp contrast, modern youth fashion.

styles.name: 东方淡彩
styles.description: 东方古意与低饱和淡彩
styles.reversePrompt: Elegant eastern light-wash illustration, low saturation palette, soft peach and jade tones, flowing traditional robes, delicate floral framing, clean background haze, poetic calm mood.

styles.name: 高能动漫卡通
styles.description: 夸张动效线与漫画拟声词冲击
styles.reversePrompt: High-energy comic cartoon style, explosive action pose, bold outlines, vibrant color clash, dynamic speed lines, onomatopoeia text effects, playful exaggeration, crisp vector-like finish.

styles.name: 美式3D
styles.description: 动画电影角色塑形与暖色电影灯光
styles.reversePrompt: Stylized American 3D animation character, cinematic warm lighting, expressive face, subsurface skin look, cozy interior depth, polished rendering, family-film quality.

styles.name: 毛绒玩具质感
styles.description: 针织与布偶材质细节，柔焦亲和感
styles.reversePrompt: Plush toy texture style, knitted fabric fibers, stitched seams, soft daylight, cozy nursery set, muted warm palette, cute handcrafted character, tactile close-up feel.

styles.name: 复杂线条都市漫
styles.description: 密线稿与克制配色的都市漫画场景
styles.reversePrompt: Detailed line-art urban manga, dense but clean strokes, restrained neutral palette, contemporary interior scene, subtle shading, cinematic framing, calm slice-of-life mood.
